# Integration merge pull request

## Owner baseline

- Owner guide: [docs/setup/OWNER_START_HERE.md](../../docs/setup/OWNER_START_HERE.md)
- Canonical source repository: `helios-platform`
- Downstream targets considered: `helios-control`, `hermes-fleet-production`

## Integration summary

Describe why this integration belongs in `helios-platform` first and what downstream changes are expected after owner approval.

## Owner governance checklist

- [ ] Repository access and organization ownership are still correct for this change.
- [ ] Repository visibility and release/distribution impact are understood.
- [ ] Branch protection and required status checks cover the changed paths.
- [ ] GitHub Actions permissions remain least-privilege and workflow changes were owner-reviewed.
- [ ] Environments, secrets, and deployment approvals are configured for any affected deployment path.
- [ ] Pages, Wiki, Projects, labels, and milestones were updated or marked not applicable.

## Integration and validation checklist

- [ ] `helios-platform` is updated before downstream changes to `helios-control` or `hermes-fleet-production`.
- [ ] Downstream compatibility, synchronization, or rollout steps are documented.
- [ ] C# / WinUI 3, C++, F#, Python, Azure CLI, AI hub, security, performance, and analytics impacts are checked where applicable.
- [ ] Tests, build checks, documentation checks, or manual validation evidence are listed below.
- [ ] Rollback or mitigation steps are documented for failed downstream propagation.
